# Product Simple Seasonality

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a simple concept of seasonality for products

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

Create seasonalities and assign them to products

Use case:

Season are recurring specific periods each year.

Apply product to season(s) allows to apply specific process to these
products.

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/product-attribute/16.0/product_simple_seasonality/static/description/seasonality.png
:::

:::{figure} https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OCA/product-attribute/16.0/product_simple_seasonality/static/description/product.png
:::
